Instructions: Do NOT edit cells with formulas!
1. Open Google Sheets -> File -> Import -> Upload this CSV file.
2. The 'Current Price' column uses real-time =GOOGLEFINANCE() API calls to pull live crypto prices.
3. To add a new row: Copy row 6 and paste it into Row 7. Then just change the Ticker (Column B)
Balance: and APY (Column I). The formulas will auto-calculate everything else.

Instructions: 4. To track CeFi vs DeFi exposure
Asset Ticker: sort the sheet by Column D (Platform/Exchange).
